arts.ttl: Arsenal unlikely to appoint 'very capable' sporting director who because the timing is not right - Journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal are starting to step up their search for Edu Gaspar’s replacement as sporting director at the Emirates Stadium and the process is heating up....

arts.ttl: Report: Saudi clubs are pushing to make Arsenal star their marquee signing this year
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs have lost their players to the football revolution in Saudi Arabia and Arsenal could become the latest club to lose one of their players. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urged to axe Arsenal hero who has already saved Gunners this season
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Dutch side PSV in the last 16 of the Champions League on Tuesday evening and Paul Merson has made a request over the team that Mikel Arteta selects

arts.ttl: Champions League supercomputer picks winner as Arsenal given better chance than Real Madrid
arts.sum: The Champions League knockout stage properly begins on Tuesday with the likes of Real Madrid, Liverpool and Barcelona all fancying their chances of winning the tournament

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Josh Kroenke’s Arsenal training ground visit amid sporting director decision
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta said he was happy to have Arsenal co-chaiman Josh Kroenke visit the training ground ahead of the midweek fixture. Josh Kroenke was spotted at the Arsenal training ground too and Arteta was asked about his arrival.

arts.ttl: PSV vs Arsenal simulated to predict Champions League round of 16 clash
arts.sum: After failing to win three of their last four games in all competitions, Arsenal will be hoping to return to winning ways when they face PSV in the Champions League round of 16 first leg later tonight. We predict that Arsenal could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Rice, Odegaard, Merino; Nwaneri, Trossard, Sterling.

arts.ttl: Jonathan David surprise transfer twist emerges amid Andrea Berta to Arsenal claims
arts.sum: Berta left the Spanish giant at the start of January following a 12-year period with the club, and the 53-year-old has been named as one of a number of candidates to succeed the former Arsenal midfielder. Arsenal director Josh Kroenke was in London today as he watched the Gunners step up their preparations for tomorrow's Champions League knockout clash with PSV Eindhoven.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on PSV tie, Josh Kroenke visit, Champions League importance
arts.sum: Yeah, but what is expected and the reality is very different many times, you know? Not getting the result that we want, but certainly being better, especially in the last game than the opposition.

arts.ttl: Arsenal made 82-goal striker transfer decision before Kai Havertz injury as £68m summer plan clear
arts.sum: Biereth had scored 15 times in 37 games for Sturm Graz in the 2023/24 season on loan from Arsenal and was sold for just £4million . With 11 games left, Mikel Arteta's side are on course to finish without a player scoring 10 or more goals.

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs PSV Eindhoven – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal return to Champions League action tonight with a trip to face PSV Eindhoven. Mikel Arteta’s men visit the Dutch champions in the first leg of their last-16 tie. The North Londoners are looking to bounce back from consecutive Premier League games without a goal.
